market_assessment: bearish cascade slowing at 23:30. BTC $76,074(-2.46%) stuck at $76K support for 1.5hr — no bounce structure, no breakdown. Volume declining ~40% from session peak. Distribution deceleration but zero accumulation signals. BCH $371.30(-9.86%) crash bounce attempt failed, stabilized at low, still 17.5% daily range. DOGE $0.103(-6.49%) continuing weakness — no support level visible until $0.095. ETH $2,094(-4.05%) approaching $2,091 wedge support. SOL $83.68(-3.04%) tracking BTC. BTC $76K is the decision point: break below = cascade to $75K; bounce above $76,550 = potential short-term bottom with $77K resistance. Probability weighted: 65% breakdown / 35% bounce.

risk_control.urgent_advice: ALL CONTRACT TRADING PAUSED — infrastructure hardening in progress. BCH 50x near-liquidation at 23:17 cost -$6.32. Root cause: stop_loss_multi.py stop_price($373.88) > liquidation_price($371.85) for short position — stop would never trigger before liquidation. Fix #1: Add liq_price validation to stop_loss_multi.py (stop must be on correct side of liquidation). Fix #2: Enforce max_leverage = min(3, max_volatility_rule) where volatility_rule = 24/daily_range_pct. BCH 17.5% → max 1.37x. Fix #3: Add pre-deployment safety check in contract_executor that rejects positions where liq_price and stop_price don't form a valid buffer zone. Real account at $40.19 futures wallet + $275.74 spot equity = $315.93 total. No new live positions until all 3 fixes verified. Paper strategies continue.
